prompt:
A timestamped hydroponic pH log page on a work surface, with a highlighted final entry indicating a reservoir within the target range after adjustment and verification. A sample cup, pH tools, and reservoir hardware nearby make it clear this is a practical nutrient-management record rather than a generic notebook page.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image with a clean near-future hydroponics-lab aesthetic: soft task lighting, realistic paper and plastic textures, no logos, no readable numbers or words, and no identifiable faces. Keep the page centered and tidy so it reads clearly as a DSPACE pH-tracking artifact.
